name: claude-code-vsc-statusline
description: Live rate limits, peak hours, and reset timers for Claude Code — right in your VS Code status bar

claudeStatusline.currencySymbol.description: Override the auto-detected currency symbol for the extra-usage bar (e.g. "$", "€", "£", "₪"). Leave empty to auto-detect from Windows locale; Israel is forced to USD by default since Anthropic bills IL accounts in $.

claudeStatusline._fakeOverrides.markdownDescription: **Debug only.** Inject fake values for QA. Shallow-merges into each field. Amounts in `extra_usage` are in **cents** (minor units): `used_credits: 720` = €7.20. Example: `{"seven_day": {"utilization": 62, "resets_at": "2026-04-30T10:00:00Z"}, "extra_usage": {"is_enabled": true, "used_credits": 720, "monthly_limit": 1000}}`. Set to `null` (or remove) to disable.
